## 7. Common Violation Patterns & Fix Reference

Evergreen reference — present regardless of whether any violation is currently active, so this file is useful both as a live report and as a lookup table the next time a violation of a known kind appears. Sourced from `scripts/shared/architecture-rules.mjs` (no new fix text invented here).

| Rule | What it forbids | Recommended fix |
|---|---|---|
| `RULE-LAYER-ORDER` | No package may import from a package at a higher layer index than its own. | Enforced in CI via `node scripts/check-boundaries.mjs`. Violations exit(1). |
| `RULE-SAME-LEVEL-PEERS` | Peer imports at the same layer index are forbidden unless the pair appears in ALLOWED_SAME_LEVEL_PAIRS. | Allowed pairs: @brandos/governance-layer→@brandos/iskill-runtime \| @brandos/iskill-runtime→@brandos/governance-layer |
| `RULE-1 — apps/web BI isolation` | `apps/web` must NOT import `@brandos/brand-intelligence` directly. All BI access routes through CPL proxy functions. | CPL proxies: getBrandMemory(), recordBrandMemoryObservation(), reviewBrandMemorySignal(), resolveBrandCognitionContext(), getBrandSummary() |
| `RULE-2 — OCL BI isolation` | `@brandos/output-control-layer` must NOT import from `@brandos/brand-intelligence`. | OCL receives all brand data via ResolvedGenerationContract. No direct BI import permitted. |
| `RULE-3 — CPL BI symbol allowlist` | `@brandos/control-plane-layer` may only import specific symbols from `@brandos/brand-intelligence`. | Allowed: getGlobalBrandIntelligenceRuntime, initBrandIntelligenceRuntime, IBrandCognitionRuntime, IBrandIntelligenceRuntime, BrandIntelligenceConfig, BrandIntelligenceResolution, createDegradedCognitionContext, createBrandSignalRepository |
| `RULE-4 — ARL ↛ OCL (Fix C1)` | `@brandos/ai-runtime-layer` must NOT import from `@brandos/output-control-layer`. | ARL is a domain-agnostic runtime kernel. Artifact prompts delivered via registerArtifactPrompt() through globalThis.__brandos_runtime_adapter bridge. |
| `RULE-5 — GL ↛ OCL (Fix C2)` | `@brandos/governance-layer` must NOT import from `@brandos/output-control-layer`. | repairJSON / extractJSON moved to @brandos/shared-utils. Import from there. |
| `RULE-6 — CPL ↛ concrete BI repos (Fix C4)` | `@brandos/control-plane-layer` must NOT import concrete BI repository classes. | Forbidden: SupabaseBrandSignalRepository, SupabaseBrandMemoryRepository, InMemoryBrandMemoryRepository. Use createBrandSignalRepository() factory instead. |
| `RULE-7 — CPL ↛ concrete BIRuntime class (Fix C3)` | `@brandos/control-plane-layer` must NOT import BrandIntelligenceRuntime concrete class as a value. | Use createDegradedCognitionContext() standalone export instead. |
| `RULE-OCL-GOVERNANCE-CONFIG` | `@brandos/output-control-layer` must NOT import from `@brandos/governance-config`. | Structural constraints now sourced directly from @brandos/contracts (Cleanup Sprint 2 WS2). Enforced by tests/boundary/dependencyBoundary.test.ts inside OCL. |
| `RULE-PL-AUTH-ISOLATION` | `@brandos/presentation-layer` must NOT re-export `@brandos/auth` symbols from src/index.ts. | Auth state injected via PLAuthProvider/PLAuthContext. Consumers import directly from @brandos/auth. |
| `RULE-ROUTE-BOUNDARY` | Next.js route files in apps/web/app/api/ must NOT import runtime layers directly. | Forbidden in routes: @brandos/governance-layer, @brandos/ai-runtime-layer, @brandos/output-control-layer, @brandos/artifact-engine-layer, @brandos/iskill-runtime, @brandos/brand-intelligence |
| `RULE-ADMIN-AUTH` | Every /api/admin/* route must call requireAdmin() before any logic. | _(see description)_ |
| `RULE-NODEJS-RUNTIME` | Next.js route files that touch CPL must export `const runtime = "nodejs"`. | _(see description)_ |
| `RULE-ARTIFACT-ENGINE-NO-TOUCH` | `engine.ts` and `registry.ts` inside @brandos/artifact-engine-layer are read-only for agents. | These are hard no-touch zones. Modifications require explicit human approval. |
